user_query: I'm planning a fishing trip to the Gulf of Mexico and need to check the ocean conditions. Can you provide me with the closest ocean conditions including wave height, tide direction, and wind speed for the coordinates 29.7604° N, 95.3698° W? Moreover, I would like a global ocean tile image for wave significant height on the same day.

TaskList.description: Retrieve ocean condition data for the specified coordinates including wave height, tide direction, and wind speed.
Get a global ocean tile image for wave significant height for the same day.
